description: Web search tool profile for codefreedom — configures container image, ports, data directory, search engines, and parser registry.
notes: The 'web' block defines all settings for 'codefreedom tools web'.
'image' is the Docker image to use — change to 'docker.io/nilayparikh/codefreedom:web-latest' for published builds. (Also available on ghcr.io/nilayparikh/codefreedom as a mirror.)
'container_name' is the Docker container name (persistent, restart unless-stopped).
'port' is the host port that maps to container port 8420 (MCP server).
'data_dir' (optional) is the host path mounted to /userdata inside the container.
'env' are environment variables forwarded to the container.
'search_engines' is a map of engine name -> {url, parser}. Use {q} for query placeholder. No engines are configured by default.
Each engine entry: 'url' is the search URL template, 'parser' is a key in 'parser_registry'.

'parser_registry' defines named parser configurations. Each parser specifies CSS selectors for extracting results, links, snippets, and AI summaries from search engine HTML. The 'standard' parser is provided as a starting point.
